task_completion.description: Verify that the CT Cranium dataset is loaded in InVesalius 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The InVesalius 3 interface is open and displays medical imaging slices (axial, coronal, sagittal views of a skull/cranium) in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Dense_Bone' mask with the correct threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Masks list (usually in the bottom left panel) contains a mask named exactly 'Dense_Bone'. If this mask is actively selected in any screenshot, the threshold range should be approximately 662 to 3071 HU (within 50 HU tolerance).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Spongy_Bone' mask with the correct threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Masks list contains a mask named exactly 'Spongy_Bone'. If this mask is actively selected in any screenshot, the threshold range should be approximately 148 to 661 HU (within 50 HU tolerance).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Soft_Tissue' mask with the correct threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Masks list contains a mask named exactly 'Soft_Tissue'. If this mask is actively selected in any screenshot, the threshold range should be approximately -700 to 147 HU (within 50 HU tolerance).

task_completion.description: Verify that the project is saved as 'tissue_atlas.inv3' in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window title bar displays 'tissue_atlas' or 'tissue_atlas.inv3', or a save dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/tissue_atlas.inv3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the InVesalius 3 GUI to create masks and save the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the InVesalius 3 interface, adjusting thresholds, and using the 'Save Project' dialog.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual InVesalius 3 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard InVesalius 3 interface is visible, not a text editor or a mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to directly generate or manipulate the .inv3 file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating three masks in InVesalius 3: 'Dense_Bone' (662 to 3071 HU), 'Spongy_Bone' (148 to 661 HU), and 'Soft_Tissue' (-700 to 147 HU). A tolerance of 50 HU is acceptable for these thresholds. The project must be saved as 'tissue_atlas.inv3' in /home/ga/Documents/. The dataset is a real CT Cranium DICOM series.
